media_buy_id.description: Publisher's unique identifier for the media buy

buyer_ref.description: Buyer's reference identifier for this media buy. Sellers SHOULD deduplicate requests with the same buyer_ref and account, returning the existing media buy rather than creating a duplicate.

buyer_campaign_ref.description: Buyer's campaign reference label. Groups related operations under a single campaign for CRM and ad server correlation.

account.description: Account billed for this media buy

rejection_reason.description: Reason provided by the seller when status is 'rejected'. Present only when status is 'rejected'.

confirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the seller confirmed this media buy. A successful create_media_buy response constitutes order confirmation.

canceled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this media buy was canceled. Present only when status is 'canceled'.

canceled_by.description: Which party initiated the cancellation. 'buyer' when canceled via update_media_buy; 'seller' when the seller cancels (e.g., policy violation, inventory withdrawal). Present only when status is 'canceled'.

cancellation_reason.description: Reason provided when the media buy was canceled. Present only when status is 'canceled'.

packages.description: Array of packages within this media buy

creative_deadline.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for creative upload deadline

revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number. Incremented on every state change or update. Callers MAY include this in update_media_buy requests for optimistic concurrency — sellers MUST reject with CONFLICT if the provided revision does not match the current value.
